---
title: Sample Slides 1
subtitle: Using CYFI/HPAE Theme (theme-highlight.scss)
author: Sebastian Freille
institute: Universidad Nacional de Córdoba
format:
  revealjs:
    embed-resources: true
    slide-number: true
    center: true
    width: 1500
    height: 900
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 1
    toc-title: "Contenidos"
    navigation-mode: linear
    controls: true
    progress: true
    transition: slide
    css: _shared/css/theme-highlight.scss
    title-slide-attributes:
      data-background-image: _shared/images/backgrounds/bg-hpae-01.png
      data-background-size: stretch
      data-background-opacity: "0.85"
lang: es
---

# Introduction {background="#43464B"}

## What is this?

- This is a **sample slide** using the CYFI/HPAE theme
- It uses `theme-highlight.scss` for styling
- Same configuration as course slides

## Features

1. Dark section headers with `{background="#43464B"}`
2. Yellow highlight theme
3. Centered content
4. Table of contents

# Content Examples {background="#43464B"}

## Text and Lists

Here's some sample content:

- First bullet point
  - Nested item
  - Another nested item
- Second bullet point
- Third bullet point

## Blockquotes

> "The only way to do great work is to love what you do."
**[Steve Jobs]**

## Math and Code

The quadratic formula: $x = \frac{-b \pm \sqrt{b^2 - 4ac}}{2a}$

```python
def hello_world():
    print("Hello, World!")
```

# Conclusion {background="#43464B"}

## Summary

- This theme is used for HPAE and CYFI courses
- Consistent styling across all slides
- Professional academic appearance
